metadata.description: Pre-canned test utterances for aide-de-camp regression testing

project.name: project_status_pods
project.utterance: how are the pods doing in options pipeline
project.description: Status query for specific project pods

project.name: project_action_deploy
project.utterance: deploy the latest version of nap-api to production
project.description: Action request to deploy a service

project.name: project_lookup_logs
project.utterance: find the recent error logs for the nap-api container

project.name: project_monitoring_config
project.utterance: set up monitoring for the kalshi-weather pipeline

project.name: project_multi_action
project.utterance: restart the nap-api pods and check the deployment status

research.name: research_brainstorm_optimization
research.utterance: let's brainstorm ways to optimize the pipeline performance

research.name: research_lookup_architecture
research.utterance: find documentation about the aide-de-camp architecture

research.name: research_investigation
research.utterance: investigate the recent latency spikes in the options pipeline

research.name: research_compare_configs
research.utterance: compare the current ArgoCD configuration with the previous version

research.name: research_deep_dive
research.utterance: do a deep dive analysis on the memory usage patterns in NEEDLE workers

personal.name: personal_reminder_daily
personal.utterance: remind me to check the cluster status every morning

personal.name: personal_status_workload
personal.utterance: what's on my plate for today

personal.name: personal_organization
personal.utterance: show me all my active beads across projects

personal.name: personal_reminder_specific
personal.utterance: remind me to follow up on the pipeline migration task tomorrow

personal.name: personal_planning
personal.utterance: help me plan my work for the sprint

exception.name: exception_critical_failure
exception.utterance: the nap-api service is down and needs immediate attention

exception.name: exception_error_investigation
exception.utterance: investigate the 500 errors in the options pipeline logs

exception.name: exception_resource_exhaustion
exception.utterance: the cluster is running out of memory and pods are getting evicted

exception.name: exception_authentication_failure
exception.utterance: fix the authentication issues with the kubectl proxy

exception.name: exception_data_loss
exception.utterance: we lost data in the session database and need to recover it

compound.name: compound_status_plus_action
compound.utterance: check the pipeline status and restart it if it's failing

compound.name: compound_multi_project
compound.utterance: how's the options pipeline doing and also check the ibkr mcp status

compound.name: compound_research_plus_action
compound.utterance: look up the deployment logs and then deploy the fix if errors are found

compound.name: compound_triple_intent
compound.utterance: check the pods, investigate the error logs, and restart the service if needed

compound.name: compound_workflow
compound.utterance: find the failing bead, analyze the error, and create a fix task for it

edge_cases.name: edge_empty_utterance
edge_cases.description: Empty utterance - should be rejected or clarified

edge_cases.description: Extremely long utterance to test parsing limits

edge_cases.name: edge_special_characters
edge_cases.utterance: Check the status of pods with special chars: @#$%^&*()_+-=[]{}|;':",./<>?

edge_cases.name: edge_unicode_emoji
edge_cases.utterance: 🚀 deploy the nap-api service 🔥 and check the pods 🎉

edge_cases.name: edge_unicode_multilingual
edge_cases.utterance: Проверить статус подов в options pipeline и проверить логи

edge_cases.name: edge_code_snippet
edge_cases.utterance: run this command: kubectl get pods -n production -l app=nap-api

edge_cases.name: edge_newlines
edge_cases.utterance:
check the pods

then check the logs

then restart the service

edge_cases.name: edge_tabs
edge_cases.utterance: check	the	pods	and	restart	the	service
